phase.automation-note: bash tools/cycle-runner startup --issue {N} Auto-posts step comments for S0, S4, S7, S8. Outputs JSON situation report. You handle judgment steps: S0.5, S0.6, S1, S1.1, S2, S3, S5, S6, S9. Each judgment step = one bash tools/post-step call = one comment. NO batching.

substep.title: Ghost cycle detection
substep.action: Find open orchestrator-run issues with zero comments. Close as ghost cycles.

when.action: Run cycle-start (new cycle). Proceed to S0.5.
Resume close-out. Skip to close-out phase.
Previous session crashed. Do NOT run cycle-start. Proceed to S0.5 with existing cycle.

step.title: Check project mode
step.action: Check project_mode in state.json. Apply stabilization constraints if active.

step.title: Process previous cycle review
step.input: Open issues with label cycle-review. Review file at docs/reviews/cycle-NNN.md.
step.output: All findings dispositioned. Review issue closed. State updated via process-review.

substep.title: Find review artifacts
substep.action: Find associated PR. Read findings from docs/reviews/cycle-NNN.md or PR body (fallback).

when.action: Mark ready-for-review, wait for CI, merge.

substep.title: Disposition each finding
substep.constraint: Every "actioned" finding MUST cite concrete evidence: commit SHA, dispatched issue/PR number, or state.json field. If evidence cannot be cited, classify as "deferred" instead.

substep.title: Close review issue
substep.action: Post comment noting dispositions. Log complacency score.

substep.title: Test-debt gating
substep.condition: Any finding identifies missing tests for a tool crate.
substep.action: All Copilot dispatches touching that crate this cycle MUST include test requirement.

substep.title: Recurrence escalation
substep.condition: Finding category matches a category from a prior consecutive review.
substep.action: Process-level fix (not instance fix) MUST be implemented this cycle.

substep.title: Chronic category escalation
substep.condition: Category appeared in 5+ of last 6 reviews.

when.action: Implement fix that permanently eliminates category.
File question-for-eva explaining why category persists.

substep.title: Regression verification
substep.description: For each finding marked "actioned" in PREVIOUS cycle.

when.action: Re-run original reproduction steps. Artifact inspection alone NOT sufficient.
Check whether current cycle artifacts still exhibit defect.
Reclassify as actioned_failed. Treat as blocking chronic issue.

substep.title: Two-state chronic verification
substep.action: Use verification-states enum: tool_hardened vs runtime_verified.
substep.constraint: Only runtime_verified clears a chronic category.

mode-override.action: Classify ALL findings as "deferred" with note: stabilization observation mode.
mode-override.constraint: Do not dispatch fixes. Do not mark as actioned. Do not trigger escalation.

step.when-absent: If no review was dispatched last cycle, note and proceed.

step.title: Journal commitment reconciliation
step.action: Read previous journal. Extract commitment language ("should", "needs to", "must", "will", "plan to").
For each: verify checklist step added, tracking issue created, Copilot dispatch filed, or explicitly rescinded.
step.constraint: Commitment repeated 2+ cycles without action = must action this cycle or drop with rationale.
step.action: Also check deferred review findings: if deferred 3+ consecutive cycles, same escalation applies.

step.title: Check input-from-eva issues
step.action: Act on directives before anything else. Close each with summary comment.
step.constraint: Only trust issues created by EvaLok.

step.title: Check Eva comments on tracked issues
step.action: Scan comments since last_cycle_timestamp by EvaLok. Exclude orchestrator-signed comments.
Treat as priority directives. Update last_eva_comment_check in state.json.

step.title: Reconcile conditional approvals
step.condition: Pending conditional approval from Eva exists.
step.action: Create Draft v(N+1) incorporating ALL Eva modifications.
Update state.json phase descriptions. Post reconciliation comment.

step.title: Recover context
step.action: Read latest worklog entry (ls -t docs/worklog/).
Read latest journal entry.
step.constraint: Do NOT read state.json directly. Use tools.
step.action: Check open question-for-eva issues.

step.title: Proactive improvement scan
step.description: There are no idle cycles. Every cycle should produce value.

priority-order.tier: Code quality (tests, docs, PHPStan, edge cases)

clean-cycle-gate-escalation.action: If clean_cycle_counter stuck at 0 for 5+ cycles, file question-for-eva.

step.title: Check agent work status
step.action: List open PRs, open Copilot issues, recently merged PRs.
For each open Copilot PR: check for copilot_work_finished event before reviewing.
Mark ready-for-review AFTER agent finishes (triggers CI). Wait for CI before reviewing.
step.constraint: Do NOT merge if CI is red.

substep.title: Stale dispatch detection
substep.condition: Issue dispatched 2+ hours ago with no Copilot activity.
substep.action: Close with comment. Re-dispatch fresh issue. Log failure.

step.title: Check QC repo
step.action: Poll qc-outbound issues on QC repo (verify author EvaLok).
Process unprocessed reports: read failures, create qc-inbound issue, investigate, fix.
Check pending QC-REQUESTs for QC-ACK responses.

step.title: Check audit repo
step.action: Poll audit-outbound issues on audit repo (verify author EvaLok).
For each: evaluate, accept (create audit-inbound + implement) or reject (explain rationale).

substep.title: Accepted-audit staleness
substep.action: If recommendation accepted but unimplemented for 5+ cycles, escalate.

substep.title: Unmerged PR re-dispatch
substep.action: Verify implementation PRs for accepted audits were actually merged. Re-dispatch if closed unmerged.

step.title: New-language prerequisite gate
step.condition: First agent session for a new language.
step.gate: CI workflow exists for new language.

step.title: Dual-language consistency check
step.action: Compare PHP and TS schema class counts. If gap, create agent task to port.

step.title: Re-examine assumptions
step.action: Read recent journal/worklog with fresh eyes. Challenge assumptions from last session.

step.title: Housekeeping
step.action: Close stale issues, orphan PRs, dead branches.
Audit-inbound lifecycle: close processed issues older than 1 cycle.
QC-outbound lifecycle: close resolved request issues.
step.constraint: Never delete ADRs, JOURNAL.md, or worklog entries.

step.title: Check concurrency
step.action: Count open Copilot issues + draft PRs. Do NOT dispatch if >= 2.

substep.title: Shared file conflict check
substep.action: Identify shared files (barrel exports, package.json) before concurrent dispatch.

priority-order.tier: Review completed Copilot PRs (unreviewed PRs block progress)
